steps.title: Identify sides relative to angle x°
steps.content:
The angle $x°$ is at the top left corner of the right triangle. From this angle's perspective:
  • The opposite side is the horizontal base = 63
  • The hypotenuse is the slanted side = 73

steps.title: Apply the sine ratio
steps.content:
Sine is the ratio of the opposite side to the hypotenuse.

$$\sin x° = \frac{\text{opposite}}{\text{hypotenuse}} = \frac{63}{73}$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
